hypothesis: If large language models extract PROV-DM-compliant synthesis graphs from materials papers using one-shot prompting with a complex in-context example, then the o4-mini model will achieve significantly higher collection rate and F1 at both structural and parametric levels than GPT-4.1 or GPT-4.1 mini under zero-shot or simpler one-shot prompting because the complex example better constrains procedural structure and attribute mapping.
